requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) — Refrigerators (GSO Energy-Efficiency Standard, BSMD-enforced)
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效标准（MEPS）——电冰箱（GSO能效标准，BSMD执行）
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效標準（MEPS）——電冰箱（GSO能效標準，BSMD執行）

summary.en: Refrigerators placed on the Bahrain market must meet the Gulf (GSO) energy-efficiency requirements, which set Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) and an energy-efficiency rating for household refrigerating appliances. The relevant standard is the GSO standard for energy efficiency of household refrigerators and freezers (the GSO 'energy efficiency standard and labelling requirements for refrigerators / refrigerator-freezers'), enforced in Bahrain by BSMD under MOIC. The standard sets an energy-efficiency ratio / index and minimum allowable values: appliances below the minimum star/efficiency threshold may not be imported or sold. Models are typically tested to the IEC 62552 series of measurement methods (as adopted by GSO) and assigned an efficiency rating used both for the MEPS gate and for the GSO Energy Efficiency Label (see frigbh-energy-002). Demonstration of conformity is part of the registration/conformity dossier held by the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 投放巴林市场的电冰箱须满足海湾（GSO）能效要求，该要求为家用制冷器具设定最低能效标准（MEPS）及能效评级。适用标准为GSO关于家用电冰箱及冷冻箱能效的标准（即GSO「电冰箱/冰箱-冷冻箱能效标准与标识要求」），在巴林由MOIC下属BSMD执行。该标准规定能效比/能效指数及最低允许值：低于最低星级/能效门槛的器具不得进口或销售。型号通常按GSO采纳的IEC 62552系列测量方法测试，并赋予能效评级，用于MEPS门槛及GSO能效标识（见frigbh-energy-002）。符合性证明为在地进口商持有的注册/符合性档案的一部分。
summary.zht: 投放巴林市場的電冰箱須滿足海灣（GSO）能效要求，該要求為家用製冷器具設定最低能效標準（MEPS）及能效評級。適用標準為GSO關於家用電冰箱及冷凍箱能效的標準（即GSO「電冰箱/冰箱-冷凍箱能效標準與標識要求」），在巴林由MOIC下屬BSMD執行。該標準規定能效比/能效指數及最低允許值：低於最低星級/能效門檻的器具不得進口或銷售。型號通常按GSO採納的IEC 62552系列測量方法測試，並賦予能效評級，用於MEPS門檻及GSO能效標識（見frigbh-energy-002）。符合性證明為在地進口商持有的註冊/符合性檔案的一部分。

standards_or_laws: GSO energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators and freezers (Gulf Standardization Organization) — Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) and energy-efficiency rating
GSO IEC 62552 (series) — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (measurement basis, as adopted by GSO)
BSMD (Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate, MOIC) — enforcement of GSO MEPS at import/sale

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), establishing grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy-consumption limits, enforced by SAMR with the China Energy Label administered under NDRC/SAMR. The measurement basis is GB/T 8059-2016, aligned with the IEC 62552 series. While both China and GSO ultimately reference IEC 62552 measurement methods, the rating scales and threshold values differ: a Chinese Grade rating does not directly map to the GSO efficiency rating, and a model compliant with China MEPS is not guaranteed to pass the GSO MEPS without recalculation against GSO thresholds.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值，由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，中国能效标识由NDRC/SAMR管理。测量基础为GB/T 8059-2016，与IEC 62552系列对接。虽然中国与GSO最终均参照IEC 62552测量方法，但评级体系与门槛值不同：中国等级评定不能直接映射至GSO能效评级，符合中国MEPS的型号未必能在不按GSO门槛重新计算的情况下通过GSO MEPS。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值，由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，中國能效標識由NDRC/SAMR管理。測量基礎為GB/T 8059-2016，與IEC 62552系列對接。雖然中國與GSO最終均參照IEC 62552測量方法，但評級體系與門檻值不同：中國等級評定不能直接映射至GSO能效評級，符合中國MEPS的型號未必能在不按GSO門檻重新計算的情況下通過GSO MEPS。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances test method (aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two gaps apply: (1) Rating recalculation — the GSO energy-efficiency rating uses its own efficiency ratio and threshold structure; a Chinese Grade 1/2 result does not automatically satisfy the GSO MEPS. The model's energy data (measured to IEC 62552 / GB-T 8059) must be evaluated against the GSO threshold to confirm it clears the minimum star/efficiency gate. (2) Conformity demonstration — proof of MEPS compliance must be packaged in the BSMD registration/conformity dossier (typically through the in-country importer) before importation; a Chinese China Energy Label rating is not, on its own, accepted as evidence of GSO MEPS conformity. Manufacturers should verify the current GSO efficiency thresholds (which are periodically tightened) for the specific volume/category of the model.
gap.zh: 存在两项差距：（1）评级重新计算——GSO能效评级采用自有的能效比及门槛结构；中国1/2级结果不会自动满足GSO MEPS。须将型号的能效数据（按IEC 62552 / GB-T 8059测量）对照GSO门槛进行评估，确认其通过最低星级/能效门槛。（2）符合性证明——MEPS合规证明须在进口前纳入BSMD注册/符合性档案（通常经由在地进口商）；中国能效标识评级本身不被接受为GSO MEPS符合性证据。制造商应针对该型号的具体容积/类别核实现行GSO能效门槛（该门槛会定期收紧）。
gap.zht: 存在兩項差距：（1）評級重新計算——GSO能效評級採用自有的能效比及門檻結構；中國1/2級結果不會自動滿足GSO MEPS。須將型號的能效數據（按IEC 62552 / GB-T 8059測量）對照GSO門檻進行評估，確認其通過最低星級/能效門檻。（2）符合性證明——MEPS合規證明須在進口前納入BSMD註冊/符合性檔案（通常經由在地進口商）；中國能效標識評級本身不被接受為GSO MEPS符合性證據。製造商應針對該型號的具體容積/類別核實現行GSO能效門檻（該門檻會定期收緊）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GSO MEPS compliance required before importation/sale of refrigerators in Bahrain; enforced by BSMD/MOIC; models below the minimum efficiency threshold are barred
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy-efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: GSO (Gulf Standardization Organization) — referenced via BSMD/MOIC adoption

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GSO Minimum Energy Performance Standards apply to refrigerators in Bahrain and are enforced by BSMD/MOIC. A Chinese GB 12021.2 grade does not automatically satisfy the GSO MEPS — energy data measured to IEC 62552 must be evaluated against the current GSO efficiency thresholds and demonstrated within the BSMD registration dossier. Confirm the applicable GSO threshold for the model's volume/category with a qualified professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GSO最低能效标准适用于巴林电冰箱，由BSMD/MOIC执行。中国GB 12021.2等级不会自动满足GSO MEPS——须将按IEC 62552测量的能效数据对照现行GSO能效门槛评估，并在BSMD注册档案中证明。请与合格专业人士核实该型号容积/类别适用的GSO门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GSO最低能效標準適用於巴林電冰箱，由BSMD/MOIC執行。中國GB 12021.2等級不會自動滿足GSO MEPS——須將按IEC 62552測量的能效數據對照現行GSO能效門檻評估，並在BSMD註冊檔案中證明。請與合格專業人士核實該型號容積/類別適用的GSO門檻。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — GSO Energy Efficiency Label for Refrigerators (Arabic content, BSMD-enforced)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——GSO电冰箱能效标签（阿拉伯文内容，BSMD执行）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——GSO電冰箱能效標籤（阿拉伯文內容，BSMD執行）

summary.en: Refrigerators sold in Bahrain must carry the GSO Energy Efficiency Label, the Gulf regional energy label (a star-rating / efficiency-class label) affixed to the appliance at point of sale. The label is mandated by the GSO energy-efficiency labelling requirements and enforced in Bahrain by BSMD under MOIC. The label displays the efficiency rating (commonly a star-based scale), the model's energy-consumption data, and identifying information, with content presented in Arabic (and typically bilingual Arabic/English). The label must correspond to the model's verified energy performance (measured to the IEC 62552 series) and to the rating established for the MEPS gate (see frigbh-energy-001). The importer/registrant is responsible for ensuring the correct GSO label is affixed before the product is offered for sale.
summary.zh: 在巴林销售的电冰箱须加贴GSO能效标签，即海湾区域能效标签（星级/能效等级标签），在销售点贴附于器具。该标签由GSO能效标识要求强制规定，在巴林由MOIC下属BSMD执行。标签展示能效评级（通常为星级制）、型号的能耗数据及识别信息，内容以阿拉伯文呈现（通常为阿拉伯文/英文双语）。标签须与型号经核实的能效（按IEC 62552系列测量）及为MEPS门槛确立的评级一致（见frigbh-energy-001）。进口商/注册人负责确保在产品上市销售前加贴正确的GSO标签。
summary.zht: 在巴林銷售的電冰箱須加貼GSO能效標籤，即海灣區域能效標籤（星級/能效等級標籤），在銷售點貼附於器具。該標籤由GSO能效標識要求強制規定，在巴林由MOIC下屬BSMD執行。標籤展示能效評級（通常為星級制）、型號的能耗數據及識別資訊，內容以阿拉伯文呈現（通常為阿拉伯文/英文雙語）。標籤須與型號經核實的能效（按IEC 62552系列測量）及為MEPS門檻確立的評級一致（見frigbh-energy-001）。進口商/註冊人負責確保在產品上市銷售前加貼正確的GSO標籤。

standards_or_laws: GSO energy-efficiency labelling requirements for refrigerators and freezers (Gulf Standardization Organization) — energy-label format and star/efficiency-class content
GSO IEC 62552 (series) — measurement basis for label energy data
BSMD (Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate, MOIC) — enforcement of GSO label affixing at point of sale

summary.en: China requires the China Energy Label (CEL) on household refrigerators under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision), based on GB 12021.2-2015. The CEL displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest) and annual energy consumption, administered through the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS); the manufacturer self-declares the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing. The China Energy Label is a Chinese-language domestic label and is structurally and linguistically different from the GSO star-rating label — it cannot be used to satisfy the Bahrain/GSO labelling obligation.
summary.zh: 中国依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订版），基于GB 12021.2-2015，要求家用电冰箱加贴中国能效标识（CEL）。CEL展示1至5级评级（1级最高）及年耗电量，由中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理；制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级。中国能效标识为中文国内标签，与GSO星级标签在结构和语言上均不同——不能用于满足巴林/GSO标识义务。
summary.zht: 中國依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂版），基於GB 12021.2-2015，要求家用電冰箱加貼中國能效標識（CEL）。CEL展示1至5級評級（1級最高）及年耗電量，由中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理；製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級。中國能效標識為中文國內標籤，與GSO星級標籤在結構和語言上均不同——不能用於滿足巴林/GSO標識義務。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: The Chinese China Energy Label cannot serve as the Bahrain label: (1) Different label scheme — GSO uses a star/efficiency-class label whereas China uses a 1-to-5 grade label; the rating must be derived against the GSO scale, not transferred from the Chinese grade. (2) Language and format — the GSO label content is in Arabic (commonly bilingual Arabic/English); a Chinese-only CEL is not accepted at point of sale in Bahrain. (3) Responsibility — the in-country importer/registrant must affix the correct GSO label consistent with the verified, BSMD-accepted energy data. Manufacturers exporting to Bahrain should supply energy data and artwork enabling the importer to produce a compliant GSO label, replacing (not merely supplementing) the China Energy Label.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识不能充当巴林标签：（1）标签体系不同——GSO采用星级/能效等级标签，而中国采用1至5级标签；评级须按GSO体系导出，而非由中国等级转移。（2）语言与格式——GSO标签内容为阿拉伯文（通常为阿拉伯文/英文双语）；仅含中文的CEL在巴林销售点不被接受。（3）责任主体——在地进口商/注册人须加贴与经核实、BSMD接受的能效数据一致的正确GSO标签。向巴林出口的制造商应提供能效数据及图样，使进口商能够制作合规的GSO标签，以替代（而非仅补充）中国能效标识。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識不能充當巴林標籤：（1）標籤體系不同——GSO採用星級/能效等級標籤，而中國採用1至5級標籤；評級須按GSO體系導出，而非由中國等級轉移。（2）語言與格式——GSO標籤內容為阿拉伯文（通常為阿拉伯文/英文雙語）；僅含中文的CEL在巴林銷售點不被接受。（3）責任主體——在地進口商/註冊人須加貼與經核實、BSMD接受的能效數據一致的正確GSO標籤。向巴林出口的製造商應提供能效數據及圖樣，使進口商能夠製作合規的GSO標籤，以替代（而非僅補充）中國能效標識。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — the GSO Energy Efficiency Label must be affixed to refrigerators at point of sale in Bahrain; enforced by BSMD/MOIC under the GSO labelling requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: GSO (Gulf Standardization Organization) — referenced via BSMD/MOIC adoption

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The GSO Energy Efficiency Label (Arabic content) is mandatory at point of sale for refrigerators in Bahrain, enforced by BSMD/MOIC. The Chinese China Energy Label does not satisfy this obligation — the GSO star/efficiency-class rating must be derived against the GSO scale and the label affixed by the in-country importer/registrant. Confirm current GSO label format and rating thresholds with a qualified professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GSO能效标签（阿拉伯文内容）是巴林电冰箱销售点的强制要求，由BSMD/MOIC执行。中国能效标识不满足该义务——GSO星级/能效等级评级须按GSO体系导出，并由在地进口商/注册人加贴标签。请与合格专业人士核实现行GSO标签格式及评级门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GSO能效標籤（阿拉伯文內容）是巴林電冰箱銷售點的強制要求，由BSMD/MOIC執行。中國能效標識不滿足該義務——GSO星級/能效等級評級須按GSO體系導出，並由在地進口商/註冊人加貼標籤。請與合格專業人士核實現行GSO標籤格式及評級門檻。
